details.IncidentDetail: "[24] RP WAS ADVS THAT CAL FIRE IS ENRT AND CHP OFCR HAS THE TRFC ON A COMPLETE STOP [Shared]"
"[22] RP IS CONCERN ABOUT TRFC BEING COMPLETED STOP / THERE IS A FIRE AND SMOKE GETTING INSIDE HER VEH -- THERE IS A BABY IN VEH -- IS CONCERN IT IS GOING TO EXPLODE [Shared]"
"[20] RP ADV OFFICER HAS VEHS STOPPED AND THERE IS A LOT OF SMOKE COMING INTO THE VEHS AND SHE HAS A BABY [Shared]"
"[17] 97-202 -- PTY PARKED BY RHS / BWTN THE 6TH AND OAK VALLEY [Shared]"
"[1] SEMI WHI CAB AND GRY TRL "
"[6] 76-302 CPZ / AT THE OFC FOR REFUEL / WILL BE AN EXT ETA"
"[3] CHECKING TO SEE IF THE AREA ROAD IS COUNTY MAINTAINED"
"[13] 76-N7 WILL HAVE TRAFFIC CONTROL AT NB SR 86 JSO 72ND #2 LANE WILL BE CLOSED FOR THE BRUSH FIRE. UNK DURATION "
"[10] B76-86 CALTRANS BOTH LNS CLOSED 86 N SO 81ST HARD CLOSURE AND TRFC IS BEING DIVERTED TO 81ST andSB 86"
"[9] S7 GOT THE OK TO OPEN SB LANES FRM THE 66TH WILL BE BRINGING TRFC SLOW "
"[8] ^ 20 NOW SET UP 67TH AVE JEO BUCHANAN "
"[3] ^ S7 AT 1604 DIVERTING NB TRFC TO WB HARRISON /// AND SB WILL BE ABLE TO GO EB OR WB ON 66TH AVE"
"[1] THERE WILL BE A ROAD CLOSURE DUE TO A BRUSH FIRE "
"[135] PER FDF // FIRE STILL NOT CONTAINED // STILL HAVE A LOT OF RESCOURCES OUT WORKING THE FIRE// CHECKING ON HOW THE FIRE IS AFFECTING THE 86 // WILL CB WITH UPDATE ON THAT [Shared]"

"[111] UU 76-S7 SPOKE WITH CALFIRE AND CT// WILL NEED NB LNS CLOSED TILL OTHER FIRE IS CONTAINED [Shared]"
"[108] 76-S7 ANOTHER FIRE IS STARTING NORTH OF THIS ONE REQ HARD CLOSURE AT 76TH AVE AS WELL ON THE NB SIDE [Shared]"
"[105] A76-020 SB LNS OPEN BREAK RELEASED [Shared]"

"[98] 86 WILL MAN AVE 76 NB TO MAKE SURE NONE OF THE SB TRFC TRIES TO CROSS OVER /// 20 ADVS CT ADVS ITLL TAKE A FEW TO OPEN SB LANES WILL NEED TO RETRIEVE CONES /// S7 NOTIFIED S5 OF THE CIRCS // AS SOON AS SB LNS ARE OPEN RELEIVE 301/20 [Shared]"
"[97] 76-S7 NOTIFY S5 ABOUT THE CIRC / 20/301 ONCE SB LNS ARE OPEN -- RELEASE UNITS [Shared]"
"[96] A76-086 MAN AVE 76 NB SIDE--- SO NO TRFC CROSSES TO THE NB LNS [Shared]"
"[95] A76-020 CT WILL TAKE COUPLE MINS TO OPEN BOTH LNS / WILL TAKE A WHILE TO PICK UP // [Shared]"
"[94] A76-086 76-21 WILL CONT MAN THE CLOSURE 86/81 // 86 WILL CONT TO THE NB SIDE [Shared]"
"[93] 76-S7 OPEN BOTH LNS / HAVE TRFC RUNNING SLOW [Shared]"
"[92] 76-S7 GOT THE CLR FOR SB LNS TO OPEN // HAVE THE UNIT ON THE 66TH TO OPEN AND BRING IN TRFC SLOW [Shared]"
"[91] 76-S7 GOT CLR TO OPEN SB / HAVE ONE THE UNITS OPEN THE SB LNS / SB LNS OPEN --76-301 CPZ [Shared]"

"[56] UU 76-S7 START 20 2' OF VISIBILITY HAVE HIM SET UP FOR CLOSURE JNO OF THE FIRE TO MAKE SURE VEHS DONT GET PASSED THE FIRE // WILL NEED 20 TO START WITH THE SB TRFC /WILL NEED 20 AT 81ST [Shared]"
